title: Chocolate Brownies
excerpt: I got this recipe from my sister, Jeanine du Preez. You're never ever going to look back at another brownie again. Believe me! Ingredients 250 ml butter 250 g dark chocolate 500 ml sugar 10 ml vanilla essence 5 large eggs 90 ml cocoa powder 180 ml cake flour 2,5 ml …
html:
I got this recipe from my sister, Jeanine du Preez. You're never ever going to look back at another brownie again. Believe me!

Ingredients

  • 250 ml butter
  • 250 g dark chocolate
  • 500 ml sugar
  • 10 ml vanilla essence
  • 5 large eggs
  • 90 ml cocoa powder
  • 180 ml cake flour
  • 2,5 ml salt

Method

  1. Melt the butter and chocolate in the microwave.
  2. Whisk the sugar and vanilla into the chocolate
  3. Whisk the eggs into the mixture one at a time
  4. Sift in the flour, cocoa and salt and whisk well
  5. Pour into a greased pan and bake for 20 to 30 minutes at 180C. It should still be a bit wobbly on top when you take it out
  6. Let cool and cut into blocks
  7. Eat with ice cream or cream. I warm my brownies up when we eat them.
